Overview

Address
197 SOUTH WILLARD STREET, COTTONWOOD, AZ 86326

9286345548

80

71 (88% of beds filled)

For-profit LLC
Provider type

Medicare/Medicaid since
1984-06-22
Setting
Urban
2 /5
★★★★★
CMS Overall Rating

CMS 5-Star Ratings

CMS rates every Medicare/Medicaid-certified nursing home on four domains. The Overall rating is driven primarily by Health Inspection results, then adjusted up or down by Staffing and Quality Measures.

Overall Rating
Composite of Health Inspection, Staffing, and Quality Measures.
★★★★★ 2/5
Health Inspection
Based on the three most recent standard surveys, with more weight on recent results.
★★★★★ 1/5
Staffing
Weighted combination of RN and total nurse staffing hours per resident per day, case-mix adjusted.
★★★★★ 1/5
Quality Measures
15 resident-level quality measures split between long-stay and short-stay (post-acute) residents.
★★★★★ 5/5
Quality Measures breakdown
Long-Stay Quality Measures ★★★★★ 5/5
Short-Stay Quality Measures ★★★★★ 4/5

Staffing & Workforce

Direct-care staffing is the strongest operational driver of quality in nursing homes. Values are hours per resident per day, derived from payroll-based journal (PBJ) submissions. "Case-mix" adjusts for resident acuity; "Adjusted" is the CMS rating-input value.

Role Reported Case-mix expected Adjusted Federal floor
Total nurse
All nursing staff combined: RN + LPN + Aide
 2.66 3.75 2.74 ≥ 3.48 Below floor
Registered Nurse (RN)
Licensed RN hours. Strongest driver of clinical outcomes.
 0.43 0.66 0.44 ≥ 0.55 Below floor
Licensed Practical Nurse (LPN)
LPN/LVN hours. Often handles medication administration.
 0.69 0.83 0.71 —
Nurse aide
CNA hours. Bulk of direct resident care — bathing, feeding, mobility.
 1.54 2.26 1.59 —
Licensed (RN + LPN)
Combined licensed nurse coverage.
 1.12 — — —
Physical therapist
Rehabilitation therapist hours — important for post-acute / rehab admissions.
 0.07 — — —

Federal minimums (phasing in under the CMS 2024 minimum staffing rule) shown for reference. RN: 0.55 hrs/resident/day. Total nurse: 3.48 hrs/resident/day.

Weekend staffing

Total nurse (weekend)
2.34
hrs / resident / day
RN (weekend)
0.21
hrs / resident / day
Total nurse (adjusted, weekend)
2.41
hrs / resident / day

Weekend under-staffing is a common quality-of-care concern — adverse events are more frequent when licensed coverage drops.

Staff turnover

Total nursing staff turnover
57.1%
annual
RN turnover
66.7%
annual
Administrators departed
New facility — insufficient data.

Resident acuity

Nursing Case-Mix Index
1.33
higher acuity than avg
Case-Mix Index Ratio
0.96
facility / state ratio

Health Inspections

CMS weights three inspection cycles to compute the Health Inspection rating: the most recent (50%), the second most recent (33%), and the oldest (17%). Each standard-survey deficiency is assigned a score based on scope and severity; complaint-survey findings and revisit scores are added to produce the cycle total.

Cycle Date Total defs. Standard Complaint Deficiency score Revisits Total score
Cycle 1 (most recent) 2025-05-21 24 20 15 132 1 132
Cycle 2/3 (prior) 2024-04-11 8 3 5 40 1 40
Total weighted health score
109.0
lower is better

Deficiencies (47)

Individual survey findings. Scope/severity uses the CMS A–L matrix: letters further down the alphabet indicate greater harm and wider scope, up through J–L (immediate jeopardy).

1 A/B/C No actual harm — minor
46 D/E/F Actual harm — potential for minor
Tag Description Scope/Severity Survey date Corrected
0684 Provide appropriate treatment and care according to orders, resident’s preferences and goals. D 2025-08-27 2025-11-21
0689 Ensure that a nursing home area is free from accident hazards and provides adequate supervision to prevent accidents. D 2025-07-01 2025-08-11
0552 Ensure that residents are fully informed and understand their health status, care and treatments. D 2025-05-21 2025-07-11
0584 Honor the resident's right to a safe, clean, comfortable and homelike environment, including but not limited to receiving treatment and supports for daily living safely. E 2025-05-21 2025-07-11
0697 Provide safe, appropriate pain management for a resident who requires such services. D 2025-05-21 2025-07-11
0727 Have a registered nurse on duty 8 hours a day; and select a registered nurse to be the director of nurses on a full time basis. E 2025-05-21 2025-07-11
0755 Provide pharmaceutical services to meet the needs of each resident and employ or obtain the services of a licensed pharmacist. E 2025-05-21 2025-07-11
0757 Ensure each resident’s drug regimen must be free from unnecessary drugs. D 2025-05-21 2025-07-11
0761 Ensure drugs and biologicals used in the facility are labeled in accordance with currently accepted professional principles; and all drugs and biologicals must be stored in locked compartments, separately locked, compartments for controlled drugs. D 2025-05-21 2025-07-11
0812 Procure food from sources approved or considered satisfactory and store, prepare, distribute and serve food in accordance with professional standards. E 2025-05-21 2025-07-11
0880 Provide and implement an infection prevention and control program. E 2025-05-21 2025-07-11
0550 Honor the resident's right to a dignified existence, self-determination, communication, and to exercise his or her rights. D 2025-05-21 2025-07-11
0607 Develop and implement policies and procedures to prevent abuse, neglect, and theft. D 2025-05-21 2025-07-11
0609 Timely report suspected abuse, neglect, or theft and report the results of the investigation to proper authorities. E 2025-05-21 2025-07-11
0610 Respond appropriately to all alleged violations. E 2025-05-21 2025-07-11
0628 Provide the required documentation or notification related to the resident's needs, appeal rights, or bed-hold policies. D 2025-05-21 2025-07-11
0636 Assess the resident completely in a timely manner when first admitted, and then periodically, at least every 12 months. D 2025-05-21 2025-07-11
0656 Develop and implement a complete care plan that meets all the resident's needs, with timetables and actions that can be measured. D 2025-05-21 2025-07-11
0657 Develop the complete care plan within 7 days of the comprehensive assessment; and prepared, reviewed, and revised by a team of health professionals. D 2025-05-21 2025-07-11
0679 Provide activities to meet all resident's needs. E 2025-05-21 2025-07-11
0689 Ensure that a nursing home area is free from accident hazards and provides adequate supervision to prevent accidents. E 2025-05-21 2025-07-11
0842 Safeguard resident-identifiable information and/or maintain medical records on each resident that are in accordance with accepted professional standards. D 2025-05-21 2025-07-11
0684 Provide appropriate treatment and care according to orders, resident’s preferences and goals. D 2025-04-03 2025-05-16
0842 Safeguard resident-identifiable information and/or maintain medical records on each resident that are in accordance with accepted professional standards. D 2025-03-26 2025-04-18
0684 Provide appropriate treatment and care according to orders, resident’s preferences and goals. D 2025-02-27 2025-03-31
0684 Provide appropriate treatment and care according to orders, resident’s preferences and goals. D 2024-12-04 2025-01-20
0610 Respond appropriately to all alleged violations. D 2024-05-16 2024-06-21
0842 Safeguard resident-identifiable information and/or maintain medical records on each resident that are in accordance with accepted professional standards. D 2024-05-16 2024-06-21
0677 Provide care and assistance to perform activities of daily living for any resident who is unable. E 2024-04-11 2024-06-03
0690 Provide appropriate care for residents who are continent or incontinent of bowel/bladder, appropriate catheter care, and appropriate care to prevent urinary tract infections. D 2024-04-11 2024-06-03
0880 Provide and implement an infection prevention and control program. E 2024-04-11 2024-06-03
0677 Provide care and assistance to perform activities of daily living for any resident who is unable. D 2023-03-02 2023-05-05
0558 Reasonably accommodate the needs and preferences of each resident. D 2022-11-17 2023-01-23
0582 Give residents notice of Medicaid/Medicare coverage and potential liability for services not covered. B 2022-11-17 2023-01-23
0623 Provide timely notification to the resident, and if applicable to the resident representative and ombudsman, before transfer or discharge, including appeal rights. D 2022-11-17 2023-01-23
0625 Notify the resident or the resident’s representative in writing how long the nursing home will hold the resident’s bed in cases of transfer to a hospital or therapeutic leave. D 2022-11-17 2023-01-23
0645 PASARR screening for Mental disorders or Intellectual Disabilities D 2022-11-17 2023-01-23
0655 Create and put into place a plan for meeting the resident's most immediate needs within 48 hours of being admitted E 2022-11-17 2023-01-23
0656 Develop and implement a complete care plan that meets all the resident's needs, with timetables and actions that can be measured. D 2022-11-17 2023-01-23
0692 Provide enough food/fluids to maintain a resident's health. D 2022-11-17 2023-01-23
0695 Provide safe and appropriate respiratory care for a resident when needed. D 2022-11-17 2023-01-23
0742 Provide the appropriate treatment and services to a resident who displays or is diagnosed with mental disorder or psychosocial adjustment difficulty, or who has a history of trauma and/or post-traumatic stress disorder. D 2022-11-17 2023-01-23
0812 Procure food from sources approved or considered satisfactory and store, prepare, distribute and serve food in accordance with professional standards. D 2022-11-17 2023-01-23
0880 Provide and implement an infection prevention and control program. E 2022-11-17 2023-01-23
0882 Designate a qualified infection preventionist to be responsible for the infection prevent and control program in the nursing home. F 2022-11-17 2023-01-23
0883 Develop and implement policies and procedures for flu and pneumonia vaccinations. D 2022-11-17 2023-01-23
0887 Educate residents and staff on COVID-19 vaccination, offer the COVID-19 vaccine to eligible residents and staff after education, and properly document each resident and staff member's vaccination status. D 2022-11-17 2023-01-23

Deficiencies 0727 — description Have a registered nurse on duty 8 hours a day; and select a registered nurse to be the director of nurses on a full time basis. 0727.description
Deficiencies 0727 — scope_severity E 0727.scope_severity
Deficiencies 0727 — survey_date 2025-05-21 0727.survey_date
Deficiencies 0727 — tag 0727 0727.tag
Deficiencies 0742 — correction_date 2023-01-23 0742.correction_date
Deficiencies 0742 — description Provide the appropriate treatment and services to a resident who displays or is diagnosed with mental disorder or psychosocial adjustment difficulty, or who has a history of trauma and/or post-traumatic stress disorder. 0742.description
Deficiencies 0742 — scope_severity D 0742.scope_severity
Deficiencies 0742 — survey_date 2022-11-17 0742.survey_date
Deficiencies 0742 — tag 0742 0742.tag
Deficiencies 0755 — correction_date 2025-07-11 0755.correction_date
Deficiencies 0755 — description Provide pharmaceutical services to meet the needs of each resident and employ or obtain the services of a licensed pharmacist. 0755.description
Deficiencies 0755 — scope_severity E 0755.scope_severity
Deficiencies 0755 — survey_date 2025-05-21 0755.survey_date
Deficiencies 0755 — tag 0755 0755.tag
Deficiencies 0757 — correction_date 2025-07-11 0757.correction_date
Deficiencies 0757 — description Ensure each resident’s drug regimen must be free from unnecessary drugs. 0757.description
Deficiencies 0757 — scope_severity D 0757.scope_severity
Deficiencies 0757 — survey_date 2025-05-21 0757.survey_date
Deficiencies 0757 — tag 0757 0757.tag
Deficiencies 0761 — correction_date 2025-07-11 0761.correction_date
Deficiencies 0761 — description Ensure drugs and biologicals used in the facility are labeled in accordance with currently accepted professional principles; and all drugs and biologicals must be stored in locked compartments, separately locked, compartments for controlled drugs. 0761.description
Deficiencies 0761 — scope_severity D 0761.scope_severity
Deficiencies 0761 — survey_date 2025-05-21 0761.survey_date
Deficiencies 0761 — tag 0761 0761.tag

Deficiencies 0812 — correction_date 2023-01-23 0812.correction_date
Deficiencies 0812 — description Procure food from sources approved or considered satisfactory and store, prepare, distribute and serve food in accordance with professional standards. 0812.description

Deficiencies 0842 — description Safeguard resident-identifiable information and/or maintain medical records on each resident that are in accordance with accepted professional standards. 0842.description

Deficiencies 0887 — description Educate residents and staff on COVID-19 vaccination, offer the COVID-19 vaccine to eligible residents and staff after education, and properly document each resident and staff member's vaccination status. 0887.description
